summary: Shares of fabless chip and software maker Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) jumped 2.1% in the afternoon session after the company announced plans to expand its strategic partnership with NEC Corporation to drive modern private cloud adoption. Under the agreement, the two companies planned to use Broadcom's VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) to help customers modernize their own private cloud systems. headline: MP Materials gets bullish Goldman call, Plug Power stock falls
summary: Yahoo Finance anchor Julie Hyman examines some of the top stories on Wall Street as part of Wednesday's Yahoo Finance Market Minute, including tech stock (XLK) action ahead of Nvidia's (NVDA) earnings, Goldman Sachs initiating coverage on MP Materials (MP), and Plug Power (PLUG) announcing plans to raise capital. headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq Jump. Most Chip Stocks Are Higher, Too.
summary: The stock market jolted higher shortly after the open as much of the tech universe, including semiconductor stocks, sees aggressive buying.  The S&P 500 was up 1%, while the Dow rose 0.4%.  Both indexes had declined for four straight days coming into today's session.

headline: Stocks to Watch Wednesday: Target, Lowe's, Adobe
summary: ↗️ Lowe's (LOW): The retailer's online business helped offset the weakness in the home-improvement sector that weighed on Home Depot's earnings. Shares jumped over 4% in premarket trading. ↘️ Target (TGT): The big-box retailer cut its annual profit outlook and said it would invest billions to upgrade stores, as a sales slump continues.
